name: Whole Wheat Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a medium-size bowl.
2. Blend oil, buttermilk and egg together in a small bowl.
3. Add to dry ingredients.
4. Mix until combined.
5. Do not beat.
6. Heat waffle iron, brushing lightly with oil if necessary.
7. Pour in enough batter to just fill the waffle maker.
8. Close the waffle iron.
9. Cook until steaming stops and waffles are crisp.
10. Serve with applesauce or fresh fruit topping.
